141:.hero__slides { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0; background: var(--night); }
142:.hero__slide { position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 1.4s ease; transform: scale(1.04); }
143:.hero__slide.is-active { opacity: 1; animation: kenburns 8s ease-out forwards; }
145:.hero__slide img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
